paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] ChronoEdit: Towards Temporal Reasoning for Image Editing and World Simulation, Jay Zhangjie Wu+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, Transformer, DiffusionModel, Selected Papers/Blogs, 2D (Image), WorldModels
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.04290 # Authors - Jay Zhangjie Wu - Xuanchi Ren - Tianchang Shen - Tianshi Cao - Kai He - Yifan Lu - Ruiyuan Gao - Enze Xie - Shiyi Lan - Jose M. Alvarez - Jun Gao - Sanja Fidler - Zian Wang - Huan Ling # Abstract - Recent advances in large generative models have greatly enhanced both image editing and in-context image generation, yet a critical gap remains in ensuring physical consistency, where edited objects must remain coherent. This capability is especially vital for world simulation related tasks. In this paper, we present ChronoEdit, a framework that reframes image editing as a video generation problem. First, ChronoEdit treats the input and edited images as the first and last frames of a video, allowing it to leverage large pretrained video generative models that capture not only object appearance but also the implicit physics of motion and interaction through learned temporal consistency. Second, ChronoEdit introduces a temporal reasoning stage that explicitly performs editing at inference time. Under this setting, target frame is jointly denoised with reasoning tokens to imagine a plausible editing trajectory that constrains the solution space to physically viable transformations. The reasoning tokens are then dropped after a few steps to avoid the high computational cost of rendering a full video. To validate ChronoEdit, we introduce PBench-Edit, a new benchmark of image-prompt pairs for contexts that require physical consistency, and demonstrate that ChronoEdit surpasses state-of-the-art baselines in both visual fidelity and physical plausibility. Project page for code and models: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/toronto-ai/chronoedit # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жңҖиҝ‘гҒ®еӨ§иҰҸжЁЎз”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®йҖІеұ•гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒз”»еғҸз·ЁйӣҶгҒЁгӮігғігғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲеҶ…з”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҒҢеӨ§е№…гҒ«еҗ‘дёҠгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҒҢгҖҒз·ЁйӣҶгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮӘгғ–гӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒҢдёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’дҝқгҒӨзү©зҗҶзҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’зўәдҝқгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«гҒҜдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®иғҪеҠӣгҒҜгҖҒзү№гҒ«дё–з•ҢгӮ·гғҹгғҘгғ¬гғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҒ«й–ўйҖЈгҒҷгӮӢгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰйҮҚиҰҒгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮжң¬и«–ж–ҮгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒChronoEditгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒз”»еғҸз·ЁйӣҶгӮ’еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ®е•ҸйЎҢгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҶҚе®ҡзҫ©гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҡгҖҒChronoEditгҒҜе…ҘеҠӣз”»еғҸгҒЁз·ЁйӣҶгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹз”»еғҸгӮ’еӢ•з”»гҒ®жңҖеҲқгҒЁжңҖеҫҢгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰжүұгҒ„гҖҒгӮӘгғ–гӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгҒ®еӨ–иҰігҒ гҒ‘гҒ§гҒӘгҒҸгҖҒеӯҰзҝ’гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҷӮй–“зҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰеӢ•гҒҚгӮ„зӣёдә’дҪңз”ЁгҒ®жҡ—й»ҷгҒ®зү©зҗҶгӮ’жҚүгҒҲгӮӢеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’жёҲгҒҝеӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮж¬ЎгҒ«гҖҒChronoEditгҒҜжҺЁи«–жҷӮгҒ«жҳҺзӨәзҡ„гҒ«з·ЁйӣҶгӮ’иЎҢгҒҶжҷӮй–“зҡ„жҺЁи«–гӮ№гғҶгғјгӮёгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®иЁӯе®ҡгҒ®дёӢгҒ§гҖҒгӮҝгғјгӮІгғғгғҲгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гҒҜжҺЁи«–гғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒЁе…ұгҒ«е…ұеҗҢгҒ§гғҺгӮӨгӮәйҷӨеҺ»гҒ•гӮҢгҖҒзү©зҗҶзҡ„гҒ«е®ҹзҸҫеҸҜиғҪгҒӘеӨүжҸӣгҒ«еҲ¶зҙ„гӮ’гҒӢгҒ‘гӮӢдҝЎй јгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢз·ЁйӣҶи»ҢйҒ“гӮ’жғіеғҸгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒқгҒ®еҫҢгҖҒжҺЁи«–гғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒҜж•°гӮ№гғҶгғғгғ—еҫҢгҒ«еүҠйҷӨгҒ•гӮҢгҖҒгғ•гғ«еӢ•з”»гҒ®гғ¬гғігғҖгғӘгғігӮ°гҒ«гӮҲгӮӢй«ҳгҒ„иЁҲз®—гӮігӮ№гғҲгӮ’еӣһйҒҝгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮChronoEditгӮ’жӨңиЁјгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒзү©зҗҶзҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’еҝ…иҰҒгҒЁгҒҷгӮӢгӮігғігғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒ®з”»еғҸгғ—гғӯгғігғ—гғҲгғҡгӮўгҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢPBench-EditгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҖҒChronoEditгҒҢиҰ–иҰҡзҡ„еҝ е®ҹжҖ§гҒЁзү©зҗҶзҡ„еҰҘеҪ“жҖ§гҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ§жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®гғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгғҡгғјгӮё: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/toronto-ai/chronoedit # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - ChronoEditгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒз”»еғҸз·ЁйӣҶгӮ’еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҶҚе®ҡзҫ©гҖӮе…ҘеҠӣз”»еғҸгҒЁз·ЁйӣҶз”»еғҸгӮ’еӢ•з”»гҒ®жңҖеҲқгҒЁжңҖеҫҢгҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гҒЁгҒ—гҖҒжҷӮй–“зҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҒҹеӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҖӮжҺЁи«–жҷӮгҒ«жҷӮй–“зҡ„жҺЁи«–гӮ№гғҶгғјгӮёгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҖҒзү©зҗҶзҡ„гҒ«е®ҹзҸҫеҸҜиғҪгҒӘеӨүжҸӣгӮ’еҲ¶зҙ„гҒҷгӮӢз·ЁйӣҶи»ҢйҒ“гӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҖӮж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜPBench-EditгҒ§гҖҒChronoEditгҒҢиҰ–иҰҡзҡ„еҝ е®ҹжҖ§гҒЁзү©зҗҶзҡ„еҰҘеҪ“жҖ§гҒ§жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®жүӢжі•гӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Rolling Forcing: Autoregressive Long Video Diffusion in Real Time, Kunhao Liu+, arXiv'25, 2025.09
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, DiffusionModel, LongSequence, VideoGeneration/Understandings, One-Line Notes
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.25161 # Authors - Kunhao Liu - Wenbo Hu - Jiale Xu - Ying Shan - Shijian Lu # Abstract - Streaming video generation, as one fundamental component in interactive world models and neural game engines, aims to generate high-quality, low-latency, and temporally coherent long video streams. However, most existing work suffers from severe error accumulation that often significantly degrades the generated stream videos over long horizons. We design Rolling Forcing, a novel video generation technique that enables streaming long videos with minimal error accumulation. Rolling Forcing comes with three novel designs. First, instead of iteratively sampling individual frames, which accelerates error propagation, we design a joint denoising scheme that simultaneously denoises multiple frames with progressively increasing noise levels. This design relaxes the strict causality across adjacent frames, effectively suppressing error growth. Second, we introduce the attention sink mechanism into the long-horizon stream video generation task, which allows the model to keep key value states of initial frames as a global context anchor and thereby enhances long-term global consistency. Third, we design an efficient training algorithm that enables few-step distillation over largely extended denoising windows. This algorithm operates on non-overlapping windows and mitigates exposure bias conditioned on self-generated histories. Extensive experiments show that Rolling Forcing enables real-time streaming generation of multi-minute videos on a single GPU, with substantially reduced error accumulation. # Translation (by paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] MMaDA: Multimodal Large Diffusion Language Models, Ling Yang+, NeurIPS'25, 2025.05
paper-entry.tags: NLP, LanguageModel, ReinforcementLearning, MultiModal, DiffusionModel, TextToImageGeneration, NeurIPS, 2D (Image), text
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.15809 # Authors - Ling Yang - Ye Tian - Bowen Li - Xinchen Zhang - Ke Shen - Yunhai Tong - Mengdi Wang # Abstract - We introduce MMaDA, a novel class of multimodal diffusion foundation models designed to achieve superior performance across diverse domains such as textual reasoning, multimodal understanding, and text-to-image generation. The approach is distinguished by three key innovations: (i) MMaDA adopts a unified diffusion architecture with a shared probabilistic formulation and a modality-agnostic design, eliminating the need for modality-specific components. This architecture ensures seamless integration and processing across different data types. (ii) We implement a mixed long chain-of-thought (CoT) fine-tuning strategy that curates a unified CoT format across modalities. By aligning reasoning processes between textual and visual domains, this strategy facilitates cold-start training for the final reinforcement learning (RL) stage, thereby enhancing the model's ability to handle complex tasks from the outset. (iii) We propose UniGRPO, a unified policy-gradient-based RL algorithm specifically tailored for diffusion foundation models. Utilizing diversified reward modeling, UniGRPO unifies post-training across both reasoning and generation tasks, ensuring consistent performance improvements. Experimental results demonstrate that MMaDA-8B exhibits strong generalization capabilities as a unified multimodal foundation model. It surpasses powerful models like LLaMA-3-7B and Qwen2-7B in textual reasoning, outperforms Show-o and SEED-X in multimodal understanding, and excels over SDXL and Janus in text-to-image generation. These achievements highlight MMaDA's effectiveness in bridging the gap between pretraining and post-training within unified diffusion architectures, providing a comprehensive framework for future research and development. We open-source our code and trained models at: https://github.com/Gen-Verse/MMaDA # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - MMaDAгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲжҺЁи«–гҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«зҗҶи§ЈгҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒӢгӮүз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®еӨҡж§ҳгҒӘгғүгғЎгӮӨгғігҒ§е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹжҖ§иғҪгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«иЁӯиЁҲгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮҜгғ©гӮ№гҒ®гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«жӢЎж•ЈеҹәзӣӨгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜгҖҒд»ҘдёӢгҒ®3гҒӨгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘйқ©ж–°гҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰзү№еҫҙд»ҳгҒ‘гӮүгӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ(i) MMaDAгҒҜгҖҒе…ұжңүзўәзҺҮзҡ„е®ҡејҸеҢ–гҒЁгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгҒ«дҫқеӯҳгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„иЁӯиЁҲгӮ’жҢҒгҒӨзөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжӢЎж•ЈгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈзү№жңүгҒ®гӮігғігғқгғјгғҚгғігғҲгӮ’еҝ…иҰҒгҒЁгҒ—гҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒҜгҖҒз•°гҒӘгӮӢгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮҝгӮӨгғ—й–“гҒ§гҒ®гӮ·гғјгғ гғ¬гӮ№гҒӘзөұеҗҲгҒЁеҮҰзҗҶгӮ’дҝқиЁјгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ(ii) жҲ‘гҖ…гҒҜгҖҒгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈй–“гҒ§зөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжҖқиҖғгҒ®жөҒгӮҢпјҲCoTпјүгғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғғгғҲгӮ’гӮӯгғҘгғ¬гғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҒҷгӮӢж··еҗҲй•·гғҒгӮ§гғјгғігғ»гӮӘгғ–гғ»гӮҪгғјгғҲпјҲCoTпјүгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°жҲҰз•ҘгӮ’е®ҹиЈ…гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒЁиҰ–иҰҡгғүгғЎгӮӨгғій–“гҒ®жҺЁи«–гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’ж•ҙеҗҲгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒгҒ“гҒ®жҲҰз•ҘгҒҜжңҖзөӮзҡ„гҒӘеј·еҢ–еӯҰзҝ’пјҲRLпјүж®өйҡҺгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гӮігғјгғ«гғүгӮ№гӮҝгғјгғҲгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’дҝғйҖІгҒ—гҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҢиӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгӮ’еҲқгӮҒгҒӢгӮүеҮҰзҗҶгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ(iii) жҲ‘гҖ…гҒҜгҖҒжӢЎж•ЈеҹәзӣӨгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹзөұдёҖгғқгғӘгӮ·гғјеӢҫй…ҚгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®RLгӮўгғ«гӮҙгғӘгӮәгғ гҒ§гҒӮгӮӢUniGRPOгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеӨҡж§ҳгҒӘе ұй…¬гғўгғҮгғӘгғігӮ°гӮ’еҲ©з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒUniGRPOгҒҜжҺЁи«–гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒЁз”ҹжҲҗгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢгғқгӮ№гғҲгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’зөұдёҖгҒ—гҖҒдёҖиІ«гҒ—гҒҹжҖ§иғҪеҗ‘дёҠгӮ’зўәдҝқгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒMMaDA-8BгҒҢзөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«еҹәзӣӨгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеј·еҠӣгҒӘдёҖиҲ¬еҢ–иғҪеҠӣгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲжҺЁи«–гҒ§гҒҜLLaMA-3-7BгӮ„Qwen2-7BгӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮҠгҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«зҗҶи§ЈгҒ§гҒҜShow-oгӮ„SEED-XгӮ’еҮҢй§•гҒ—гҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒӢгӮүз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҒ§гҒҜSDXLгӮ„JanusгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®жҲҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒзөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжӢЎж•ЈгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈеҶ…гҒ§гҒ®дәӢеүҚгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒЁдәӢеҫҢгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ®гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’еҹӢгӮҒгӮӢMMaDAгҒ®еҠ№жһңгӮ’еј·иӘҝгҒ—гҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒд»ҠеҫҢгҒ®з ”з©¶гҒЁй–ӢзҷәгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®еҢ…жӢ¬зҡ„гҒӘгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҒгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°жёҲгҒҝгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ§жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷ: https://github.com/Gen-Verse/MMaDA # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - MMaDAгҒҜгҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲжҺЁи«–гӮ„гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«зҗҶи§ЈгҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒӢгӮүз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҒ«е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«жӢЎж•ЈеҹәзӣӨгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮдё»гҒӘйқ©ж–°зӮ№гҒҜгҖҒгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгҒ«дҫқеӯҳгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„зөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжӢЎж•ЈгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҖҒж··еҗҲй•·гғҒгӮ§гғјгғігғ»гӮӘгғ–гғ»гӮҪгғјгғҲгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢгғ•гӮЎгӮӨгғігғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°жҲҰз•ҘгҖҒгҒқгҒ—гҒҰUniGRPOгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶзөұдёҖгғқгғӘгӮ·гғјеӢҫй…ҚгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®RLгӮўгғ«гӮҙгғӘгӮәгғ гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮе®ҹйЁ“гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒMMaDA-8BгҒҜд»–гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒдәӢеүҚгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒЁдәӢеҫҢгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ®гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гӮ’еҹӢгӮҒгӮӢеҠ№жһңгҒҢзўәиӘҚгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°жёҲгҒҝгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒ§жҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Block Diffusion: Interpolating Between Autoregressive and Diffusion Language Models, Marianne Arriola+, ICLR'25, 2025.03
paper-entry.tags: LanguageModel, DiffusionModel, ICLR, read-later, Selected Papers/Blogs
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.09573 # Authors - Marianne Arriola - Aaron Gokaslan - Justin T. Chiu - Zhihan Yang - Zhixuan Qi - Jiaqi Han - Subham Sekhar Sahoo - Volodymyr Kuleshov # Abstract - Diffusion language models offer unique benefits over autoregressive models due to their potential for parallelized generation and controllability, yet they lag in likelihood modeling and are limited to fixed-length generation. In this work, we introduce a class of block diffusion language models that interpolate between discrete denoising diffusion and autoregressive models. Block diffusion overcomes key limitations of both approaches by supporting flexible-length generation and improving inference efficiency with KV caching and parallel token sampling. We propose a recipe for building effective block diffusion models that includes an efficient training algorithm, estimators of gradient variance, and data-driven noise schedules to minimize the variance. Block diffusion sets a new state-of-the-art performance among diffusion models on language modeling benchmarks and enables generation of arbitrary-length sequences. We provide the code, along with the model weights and blog post on the project page: https://m-arriola.com/bd3lms # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жӢЎж•ЈиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒиҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰдёҰеҲ—з”ҹжҲҗгӮ„еҲ¶еҫЎжҖ§гҒ®еҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒҢгҒӮгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒзӢ¬иҮӘгҒ®еҲ©зӮ№гӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒе°ӨеәҰгғўгғҮгғӘгғігӮ°гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜеҠЈгҒЈгҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒеӣәе®ҡй•·гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«еҲ¶йҷҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒйӣўж•Јзҡ„гҒӘгғҮгғҺгӮӨгӮёгғігӮ°жӢЎж•ЈгҒЁиҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®й–“гӮ’иЈңй–“гҒҷгӮӢгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜжӢЎж•ЈиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гӮҜгғ©гӮ№гӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜжӢЎж•ЈгҒҜгҖҒжҹ”и»ҹгҒӘй•·гҒ•гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгӮ’гӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒ—гҖҒKVгӮӯгғЈгғғгӮ·гғігӮ°гӮ„дёҰеҲ—гғҲгғјгӮҜгғігӮөгғігғ—гғӘгғігӮ°гҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰжҺЁи«–еҠ№зҺҮгӮ’ж”№е–„гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒдёЎгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ®дё»иҰҒгҒӘеҲ¶йҷҗгӮ’е…ӢжңҚгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮўгғ«гӮҙгғӘгӮәгғ гҖҒеӢҫй…ҚеҲҶж•ЈгҒ®жҺЁе®ҡеҷЁгҖҒеҲҶж•ЈгӮ’жңҖе°ҸеҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝй§ҶеӢ•еһӢгғҺгӮӨгӮәгӮ№гӮұгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гӮ’еҗ«гӮҖеҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒӘгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜжӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®ж§ӢзҜүгғ¬гӮ·гғ”гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜжӢЎж•ЈгҒҜгҖҒиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғӘгғігӮ°гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰжӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’иЁӯе®ҡгҒ—гҖҒд»»ж„ҸгҒ®й•·гҒ•гҒ®гӮ·гғјгӮұгғігӮ№гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгӮ’еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮігғјгғүгҖҒгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®йҮҚгҒҝгҖҒгҒҠгӮҲгҒігғ—гғӯгӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгғҡгғјгӮёгҒ®гғ–гғӯгӮ°иЁҳдәӢгӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷ: https://m-arriola.com/bd3lms # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜжӢЎж•ЈиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒжӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁиҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®еҲ©зӮ№гӮ’зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҖҒжҹ”и»ҹгҒӘй•·гҒ•гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгӮ’еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒ—гҖҒжҺЁи«–еҠ№зҺҮгӮ’еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҖӮеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮўгғ«гӮҙгғӘгӮәгғ гӮ„гғҮгғјгӮҝй§ҶеӢ•еһӢгғҺгӮӨгӮәгӮ№гӮұгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғӘгғігӮ°гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ§ж–°гҒҹгҒӘжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] On Powerful Ways to Generate: Autoregression, Diffusion, and Beyond, Chenxiao Yang+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: Analysis, NLP, LanguageModel, DiffusionModel, Architecture, read-later, Selected Papers/Blogs
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/pdf/2510.06190 # Authors - Chenxiao Yang - Cai Zhou - David Wipf - Zhiyuan Li # Abstract - This paper formally studies generation processes, including auto-regressive next-token prediction and masked diffusion, that abstract beyond architectural specifics. At this level of abstraction, we quantify their benefits and limitations through measurable criteria such as computational hardness and learnability. In particular, we demonstrate that allowing generation to proceed beyond autoregression and current masked diffusion, with capabilities to rewrite and length-variable edit, can bring significant theoretical and empirical advantages, with important implications for frontier LLMs that aspire to tackle increasingly hard problems and work universally across domains beyond natural language, such as coding and science. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жң¬и«–ж–ҮгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ®зү№е®ҡгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҹз”ҹжҲҗгғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гҖҒгҒҷгҒӘгӮҸгҒЎиҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°зҡ„гҒӘж¬ЎгғҲгғјгӮҜгғідәҲжё¬гҒЁгғһгӮ№гӮҜгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжӢЎж•ЈгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰжӯЈејҸгҒ«з ”з©¶гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®жҠҪиұЎгғ¬гғҷгғ«гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒиЁҲз®—гҒ®йӣЈжҳ“еәҰгӮ„еӯҰзҝ’еҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҒЁгҒ„гҒЈгҒҹжё¬е®ҡеҸҜиғҪгҒӘеҹәжә–гӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгҖҒгҒқгӮҢгӮүгҒ®еҲ©зӮ№гҒЁйҷҗз•ҢгӮ’е®ҡйҮҸеҢ–гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒиҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°гӮ„зҸҫеңЁгҒ®гғһгӮ№гӮҜгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжӢЎж•ЈгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҰз”ҹжҲҗгӮ’йҖІгӮҒгҖҒжӣёгҒҚжҸӣгҒҲгӮ„й•·гҒ•еҸҜеӨүгҒ®з·ЁйӣҶгҒҢеҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒӘгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒзҗҶи«–зҡ„гҒҠгӮҲгҒіе®ҹиЁјзҡ„гҒӘеӨ§гҒҚгҒӘеҲ©зӮ№гӮ’гӮӮгҒҹгӮүгҒҷгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒгҒҫгҒҷгҒҫгҒҷйӣЈгҒ—гҒ„е•ҸйЎҢгҒ«еҸ–гӮҠзө„гҒҝгҖҒиҮӘз„¶иЁҖиӘһгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҹгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ„з§‘еӯҰгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®й ҳеҹҹгҒ§жҷ®йҒҚзҡ„гҒ«ж©ҹиғҪгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӣ®жҢҮгҒҷжңҖеүҚз·ҡгҒ®еӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲLLMпјүгҒ«гҒЁгҒЈгҒҰйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘж„Ҹе‘ігӮ’жҢҒгҒЎгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - иҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°зҡ„гҒӘж¬ЎгғҲгғјгӮҜгғідәҲжё¬гҒЁгғһгӮ№гӮҜгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹжӢЎж•ЈгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҹз”ҹжҲҗгғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’з ”з©¶гҒ—гҖҒгҒқгҒ®еҲ©зӮ№гҒЁйҷҗз•ҢгӮ’е®ҡйҮҸеҢ–гҖӮжӣёгҒҚжҸӣгҒҲгӮ„й•·гҒ•еҸҜеӨүгҒ®з·ЁйӣҶгҒҢеҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒӘгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒзҗҶи«–зҡ„гҒҠгӮҲгҒіе®ҹиЁјзҡ„гҒӘеҲ©зӮ№гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒиҮӘз„¶иЁҖиӘһд»ҘеӨ–гҒ®й ҳеҹҹгҒ§гӮӮж©ҹиғҪгҒҷгӮӢеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲLLMпјүгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒжҖ§гӮ’еј·иӘҝгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] LongCat-Video Technical Report, Meituan LongCat Team+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, DiffusionModel, OpenWeight, VideoGeneration/Understandings, WorldModels, 4D (Video), TextToVideoGeneration, SparseAttention, Video Continuation, ImageToVideoGeneration
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.22200 # Authors - Meituan LongCat Team - Xunliang Cai - Qilong Huang - Zhuoliang Kang - Hongyu Li - Shijun Liang - Liya Ma - Siyu Ren - Xiaoming Wei - Rixu Xie - Tong Zhang # Abstract - Video generation is a critical pathway toward world models, with efficient long video inference as a key capability. Toward this end, we introduce LongCat-Video, a foundational video generation model with 13.6B parameters, delivering strong performance across multiple video generation tasks. It particularly excels in efficient and high-quality long video generation, representing our first step toward world models. Key features include: Unified architecture for multiple tasks: Built on the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) framework, LongCat-Video supports Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, and Video-Continuation tasks with a single model; Long video generation: Pretraining on Video-Continuation tasks enables LongCat-Video to maintain high quality and temporal coherence in the generation of minutes-long videos; Efficient inference: LongCat-Video generates 720p, 30fps videos within minutes by employing a coarse-to-fine generation strategy along both the temporal and spatial axes. Block Sparse Attention further enhances efficiency, particularly at high resolutions; Strong performance with multi-reward RLHF: Multi-reward RLHF training enables LongCat-Video to achieve performance on par with the latest closed-source and leading open-source models. Code and model weights are publicly available to accelerate progress in the field. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒҜгҖҒдё–з•ҢгғўгғҮгғ«гҒёгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘйҒ“зӯӢгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘй•·жҷӮй–“еӢ•з”»жҺЁи«–гҒҢйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘиғҪеҠӣгҒЁгҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®зӣ®зҡ„гҒ«еҗ‘гҒ‘гҒҰгҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜ13.6Bгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгӮ’жҢҒгҒӨеҹәзӣӨзҡ„гҒӘеӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҖҢLongCat-VideoгҖҚгӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰеј·еҠӣгҒӘгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮзү№гҒ«гҖҒеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒ§й«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒӘй•·жҷӮй–“еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«е„ӘгӮҢгҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒдё–з•ҢгғўгғҮгғ«гҒёгҒ®з¬¬дёҖжӯ©гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮдё»гҒӘзү№еҫҙгҒҜд»ҘдёӢгҒ®йҖҡгӮҠгҒ§гҒҷпјҡиӨҮж•°гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«еҜҫеҝңгҒ—гҒҹзөұдёҖгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈпјҡDiffusion TransformerпјҲDiTпјүгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҚгҖҒLongCat-VideoгҒҜгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгҒӢгӮүеӢ•з”»гҖҒз”»еғҸгҒӢгӮүеӢ•з”»гҖҒеӢ•з”»гҒ®з¶ҷз¶ҡгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгӮ’еҚҳдёҖгҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷпјӣй•·жҷӮй–“еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗпјҡеӢ•з”»гҒ®з¶ҷз¶ҡгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§гҒ®дәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒLongCat-VideoгҒҜж•°еҲҶй–“гҒ®еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒЁжҷӮй–“зҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’з¶ӯжҢҒгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷпјӣеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘжҺЁи«–пјҡLongCat-VideoгҒҜгҖҒзІ—гҒӢгӮүзҙ°гҒёгҒ®з”ҹжҲҗжҲҰз•ҘгӮ’жҷӮй–“и»ёгҒЁз©әй–“и»ёгҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ§жҺЎз”ЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒ720pгҖҒ30fpsгҒ®еӢ•з”»гӮ’ж•°еҲҶгҒ§з”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜгӮ№гғ‘гғјгӮ№гӮўгғҶгғігӮ·гғ§гғігҒҜгҖҒзү№гҒ«й«ҳи§ЈеғҸеәҰгҒ§гҒ®еҠ№зҺҮгӮ’гҒ•гӮүгҒ«еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгҒҫгҒҷпјӣгғһгғ«гғҒгғӘгғҜгғјгғүRLHFгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢеј·еҠӣгҒӘгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№пјҡгғһгғ«гғҒгғӘгғҜгғјгғүRLHFгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒLongCat-VideoгҒҜжңҖж–°гҒ®гӮҜгғӯгғјгӮәгғүгӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒҠгӮҲгҒідё»иҰҒгҒӘгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҗҢзӯүгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®йҮҚгҒҝгҒҜе…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒеҲҶйҮҺгҒ®йҖІеұ•гӮ’еҠ йҖҹгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - гҖҢLongCat-VideoгҖҚгҒҜгҖҒ13.6Bгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгӮ’жҢҒгҒӨеӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰй«ҳгҒ„гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮDiffusion Transformerгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҚгҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгӮ„з”»еғҸгҒӢгӮүеӢ•з”»гӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҖҒй•·жҷӮй–“еӢ•з”»гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮй«ҳе“ҒиіӘгҒЁдёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’з¶ӯжҢҒгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘжҺЁи«–гӮ’е®ҹзҸҫгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒзІ—гҒӢгӮүзҙ°гҒёгҒ®з”ҹжҲҗжҲҰз•ҘгҒЁгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜгӮ№гғ‘гғјгӮ№гӮўгғҶгғігӮ·гғ§гғігӮ’жҺЎз”ЁгҒ—гҖҒ720pгҖҒ30fpsгҒ®еӢ•з”»гӮ’ж•°еҲҶгҒ§з”ҹжҲҗеҸҜиғҪгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгғһгғ«гғҒгғӘгғҜгғјгғүRLHFгҒ«гӮҲгӮӢгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒжңҖж–°гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҗҢзӯүгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒгӮігғјгғүгҒЁгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®йҮҚгҒҝгҒҜе…¬й–ӢгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Emu3.5: Native Multimodal Models are World Learners, Yufeng Cui+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, EfficiencyImprovement, NLP, LanguageModel, Transformer, MultiModal, DiffusionModel, 2D (Image), UMM, text
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.26583 # Authors - Yufeng Cui - Honghao Chen - Haoge Deng - Xu Huang - Xinghang Li - Jirong Liu - Yang Liu - Zhuoyan Luo - Jinsheng Wang - Wenxuan Wang - Yueze Wang - Chengyuan Wang - Fan Zhang - Yingli Zhao - Ting Pan - Xianduo Li - Zecheng Hao - Wenxuan Ma - Zhuo Chen - Yulong Ao - Tiejun Huang - Zhongyuan Wang - Xinlong Wang # Abstract - We introduce Emu3.5, a large-scale multimodal world model that natively predicts the next state across vision and language. Emu3.5 is pre-trained end-to-end with a unified next-token prediction objective on a corpus of vision-language interleaved data containing over 10 trillion tokens, primarily derived from sequential frames and transcripts of internet videos. The model naturally accepts interleaved vision-language inputs and generates interleaved vision-language outputs. Emu3.5 is further post-trained with large-scale reinforcement learning to enhance multimodal reasoning and generation. To improve inference efficiency, we propose Discrete Diffusion Adaptation (DiDA), which converts token-by-token decoding into bidirectional parallel prediction, accelerating per-image inference by about 20x without sacrificing performance. Emu3.5 exhibits strong native multimodal capabilities, including long-horizon vision-language generation, any-to-image (X2I) generation, and complex text-rich image generation. It also exhibits generalizable world-modeling abilities, enabling spatiotemporally consistent world exploration and open-world embodied manipulation across diverse scenarios and tasks. For comparison, Emu3.5 achieves performance comparable to Gemini 2.5 Flash Image (Nano Banana) on image generation and editing tasks and demonstrates superior results on a suite of interleaved generation tasks. We open-source Emu3.5 at https://github.com/baaivision/Emu3.5 to support community research. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - Emu3.5гӮ’зҙ№д»ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒиҰ–иҰҡгҒЁиЁҖиӘһгҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ«гӮҸгҒҹгҒЈгҒҰж¬ЎгҒ®зҠ¶ж…ӢгӮ’гғҚгӮӨгғҶгӮЈгғ–гҒ«дәҲжё¬гҒҷгӮӢеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғҜгғјгғ«гғүгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮEmu3.5гҒҜгҖҒгӮӨгғігӮҝгғјгғҚгғғгғҲеӢ•з”»гҒ®йҖЈз¶ҡгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гҒЁгғҲгғ©гғігӮ№гӮҜгғӘгғ—гғҲгҒӢгӮүдё»гҒ«жҙҫз”ҹгҒ—гҒҹгҖҒ10е…ҶгғҲгғјгӮҜгғід»ҘдёҠгӮ’еҗ«гӮҖиҰ–иҰҡгҒЁиЁҖиӘһгҒҢдәӨдә’гҒ«зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒ•гҒЈгҒҹгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮігғјгғ‘гӮ№гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒзөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹж¬ЎгғҲгғјгӮҜгғідәҲжё¬гҒ®зӣ®зҡ„гҒ§гӮЁгғігғүгғ„гғјгӮЁгғігғүгҒ§дәӢеүҚиЁ“з·ҙгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒдәӨдә’гҒ«зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒ•гҒЈгҒҹиҰ–иҰҡгҒЁиЁҖиӘһгҒ®е…ҘеҠӣгӮ’иҮӘз„¶гҒ«еҸ—гҒ‘е…ҘгӮҢгҖҒдәӨдә’гҒ«зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒ•гҒЈгҒҹиҰ–иҰҡгҒЁиЁҖиӘһгҒ®еҮәеҠӣгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒEmu3.5гҒҜеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘеј·еҢ–еӯҰзҝ’гҒ§еҫҢиЁ“з·ҙгҒ•гӮҢгҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гҒӘжҺЁи«–гҒЁз”ҹжҲҗгӮ’еј·еҢ–гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжҺЁи«–еҠ№зҺҮгӮ’ж”№е–„гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒ”гҒЁгҒ®гғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’еҸҢж–№еҗ‘гҒ®дёҰеҲ—дәҲжё¬гҒ«еӨүжҸӣгҒҷгӮӢгҖҢDiscrete Diffusion AdaptationпјҲDiDAпјүгҖҚгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зҠ зүІгҒ«гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒӘгҒҸгҖҒз”»еғҸгҒ”гҒЁгҒ®жҺЁи«–гӮ’зҙ„20еҖҚеҠ йҖҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮEmu3.5гҒҜгҖҒй•·жңҹзҡ„гҒӘиҰ–иҰҡгҒЁиЁҖиӘһгҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгҖҒд»»ж„ҸгҒӢгӮүз”»еғҸпјҲX2Iпјүз”ҹжҲҗгҖҒиӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгғӘгғғгғҒгҒӘз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒеј·еҠӣгҒӘгғҚгӮӨгғҶгӮЈгғ–гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«иғҪеҠӣгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒгҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘгӮ·гғҠгғӘгӮӘгӮ„гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гӮҸгҒҹгӮӢжҷӮз©әй–“зҡ„гҒ«дёҖиІ«гҒ—гҒҹдё–з•ҢжҺўзҙўгҒЁгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігғҜгғјгғ«гғүгҒ®е…·зҸҫеҢ–ж“ҚдҪңгӮ’еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒҷгӮӢдёҖиҲ¬еҢ–еҸҜиғҪгҒӘгғҜгғјгғ«гғүгғўгғҮгғӘгғігӮ°иғҪеҠӣгӮӮеӮҷгҒҲгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжҜ”ијғгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒEmu3.5гҒҜз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҒҠгӮҲгҒіз·ЁйӣҶгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰGemini 2.5 Flash ImageпјҲNano BananaпјүгҒЁеҗҢзӯүгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒдәӨдә’з”ҹжҲҗгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ®гӮ№гӮӨгғјгғҲгҒ§е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹзөҗжһңгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгӮігғҹгғҘгғӢгғҶгӮЈгҒ®з ”з©¶гӮ’ж”ҜжҸҙгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒEmu3.5гӮ’https://github.com/baaivision/Emu3.5гҒ§гӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№еҢ–гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - Emu3.5гҒҜгҖҒиҰ–иҰҡгҒЁиЁҖиӘһгҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸж¬ЎгҒ®зҠ¶ж…ӢгӮ’дәҲжё¬гҒҷгӮӢеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғҜгғјгғ«гғүгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ§гҖҒ10е…ҶгғҲгғјгӮҜгғід»ҘдёҠгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ§дәӢеүҚиЁ“з·ҙгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮеҸҢж–№еҗ‘гҒ®дёҰеҲ—дәҲжё¬гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҹгҖҢDiscrete Diffusion AdaptationпјҲDiDAпјүгҖҚгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒжҺЁи«–гӮ’зҙ„20еҖҚеҠ йҖҹгҒ—гҖҒеј·еҠӣгҒӘгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«иғҪеҠӣгӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮEmu3.5гҒҜгҖҒз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгӮ„з·ЁйӣҶгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒгӮӘгғјгғ—гғігӮҪгғјгӮ№гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰжҸҗдҫӣгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] The Principles of Diffusion Models, Chieh-Hsin Lai+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: Tutorial, ComputerVision, DiffusionModel
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.21890 # Authors - Chieh-Hsin Lai - Yang Song - Dongjun Kim - Yuki Mitsufuji - Stefano Ermon # Abstract - This monograph presents the core principles that have guided the development of diffusion models, tracing their origins and showing how diverse formulations arise from shared mathematical ideas. Diffusion modeling starts by defining a forward process that gradually corrupts data into noise, linking the data distribution to a simple prior through a continuum of intermediate distributions. The goal is to learn a reverse process that transforms noise back into data while recovering the same intermediates. We describe three complementary views. The variational view, inspired by variational autoencoders, sees diffusion as learning to remove noise step by step. The score-based view, rooted in energy-based modeling, learns the gradient of the evolving data distribution, indicating how to nudge samples toward more likely regions. The flow-based view, related to normalizing flows, treats generation as following a smooth path that moves samples from noise to data under a learned velocity field. These perspectives share a common backbone: a time-dependent velocity field whose flow transports a simple prior to the data. Sampling then amounts to solving a differential equation that evolves noise into data along a continuous trajectory. On this foundation, the monograph discusses guidance for controllable generation, efficient numerical solvers, and diffusion-motivated flow-map models that learn direct mappings between arbitrary times. It provides a conceptual and mathematically grounded understanding of diffusion models for readers with basic deep-learning knowledge. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Optimization Benchmark for Diffusion Models on Dynamical Systems, Fabian Schaipp, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: Analysis, MachineLearning, DiffusionModel, Optimizer
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.19376v1 # Authors - Fabian Schaipp # Abstract - The training of diffusion models is often absent in the evaluation of new optimization techniques. In this work, we benchmark recent optimization algorithms for training a diffusion model for denoising flow trajectories. We observe that Muon and SOAP are highly efficient alternatives to AdamW (18% lower final loss). We also revisit several recent phenomena related to the training of models for text or image applications in the context of diffusion model training. This includes the impact of the learning-rate schedule on the training dynamics, and the performance gap between Adam and SGD. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒҜгҖҒж–°гҒ—гҒ„жңҖйҒ©еҢ–жүӢжі•гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҒ—гҒ°гҒ—гҒ°ж¬ еҰӮгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгғҺгӮӨгӮәйҷӨеҺ»гғ•гғӯгғјгғҲгғ©гӮёгӮ§гӮҜгғҲгғӘгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢжңҖиҝ‘гҒ®жңҖйҒ©еҢ–гӮўгғ«гӮҙгғӘгӮәгғ гӮ’гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮMuonгҒЁSOAPгҒҢAdamWгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰйқһеёёгҒ«еҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘд»ЈжӣҝжүӢж®өгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒжңҖзөӮжҗҚеӨұгҒҢ18%дҪҺгҒ„гҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иҰіеҜҹгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒжӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ®ж–Үи„ҲгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгӮ„з”»еғҸгӮўгғ—гғӘгӮұгғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҒ®гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ«й–ўйҖЈгҒҷгӮӢгҒ„гҒҸгҒӨгҒӢгҒ®жңҖиҝ‘гҒ®зҸҫиұЎгӮ’еҶҚиҖғгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«гҒҜгҖҒеӯҰзҝ’зҺҮгӮ№гӮұгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гҒҢгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҖгӮӨгғҠгғҹгӮҜгӮ№гҒ«дёҺгҒҲгӮӢеҪұйҹҝгӮ„гҖҒAdamгҒЁSGDгҒ®й–“гҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гҒҢеҗ«гҒҫгӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®гғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢжңҖйҒ©еҢ–жүӢжі•гӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҖҒMuonгҒЁSOAPгҒҢAdamWгҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒӘд»ЈжӣҝжүӢж®өгҒ§гҒӮгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒжңҖзөӮжҗҚеӨұгҒҢ18%дҪҺдёӢгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иҰіеҜҹгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒеӯҰзҝ’зҺҮгӮ№гӮұгӮёгғҘгғјгғ«гӮ„AdamгҒЁSGDгҒ®гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ®гғЈгғғгғ—гҒӘгҒ©гҖҒгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°гғҖгӮӨгғҠгғҹгӮҜгӮ№гҒ«й–ўйҖЈгҒҷгӮӢзҸҫиұЎгӮ’еҶҚиҖғгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Positional Encoding Field, Yunpeng Bai+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, Transformer, DiffusionModel, read-later
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.20385 # Authors - Yunpeng Bai - Haoxiang Li - Qixing Huang # Abstract - Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have emerged as the dominant architecture for visual generation, powering state-of-the-art image and video models. By representing images as patch tokens with positional encodings (PEs), DiTs combine Transformer scalability with spatial and temporal inductive biases. In this work, we revisit how DiTs organize visual content and discover that patch tokens exhibit a surprising degree of independence: even when PEs are perturbed, DiTs still produce globally coherent outputs, indicating that spatial coherence is primarily governed by PEs. Motivated by this finding, we introduce the Positional Encoding Field (PE-Field), which extends positional encodings from the 2D plane to a structured 3D field. PE-Field incorporates depth-aware encodings for volumetric reasoning and hierarchical encodings for fine-grained sub-patch control, enabling DiTs to model geometry directly in 3D space. Our PE-Field-augmented DiT achieves state-of-the-art performance on single-image novel view synthesis and generalizes to controllable spatial image editing. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - Diffusion TransformersпјҲDiTsпјүгҒҜгҖҒиҰ–иҰҡз”ҹжҲҗгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®ж”Ҝй…Қзҡ„гҒӘгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰзҷ»е ҙгҒ—гҖҒжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®з”»еғҸгҒҠгӮҲгҒіеӢ•з”»гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’ж”ҜгҒҲгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз”»еғҸгӮ’дҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°пјҲPEпјүгӮ’жҢҒгҒӨгғ‘гғғгғҒгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒЁгҒ—гҒҰиЎЁзҸҫгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒDiTsгҒҜTransformerгҒ®гӮ№гӮұгғјгғ©гғ“гғӘгғҶгӮЈгҒЁз©әй–“зҡ„гҒҠгӮҲгҒіжҷӮй–“зҡ„гҒӘеё°зҙҚзҡ„гғҗгӮӨгӮўгӮ№гӮ’зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒDiTsгҒҢиҰ–иҰҡгӮігғігғҶгғігғ„гӮ’гҒ©гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«ж•ҙзҗҶгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒӢгӮ’еҶҚиҖғгҒ—гҖҒгғ‘гғғгғҒгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒҢй©ҡгҒҸгҒ№гҒҚзӢ¬з«ӢжҖ§гӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зҷәиҰӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮPEгҒҢж‘ӮеӢ•гҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгӮӮгҖҒDiTsгҒҜдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰгӮ°гғӯгғјгғҗгғ«гҒ«дёҖиІ«гҒ—гҒҹеҮәеҠӣгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒӢгӮүгҖҒз©әй–“зҡ„гҒӘдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒҜдё»гҒ«PEгҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰж”Ҝй…ҚгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢзӨәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®зҷәиҰӢгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҚгҖҒжҲ‘гҖ…гҒҜдҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’2Dе№ійқўгҒӢгӮүж§ӢйҖ еҢ–гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹ3Dгғ•гӮЈгғјгғ«гғүгҒ«жӢЎејөгҒҷгӮӢдҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гғ•гӮЈгғјгғ«гғүпјҲPE-FieldпјүгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮPE-FieldгҒҜгҖҒгғңгғӘгғҘгғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜжҺЁи«–гҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®ж·ұгҒ•гҒ«й…Қж…®гҒ—гҒҹгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒЁгҖҒзҙ°гҒӢгҒ„гӮөгғ–гғ‘гғғгғҒеҲ¶еҫЎгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®йҡҺеұӨзҡ„гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’зө„гҒҝиҫјгҒҝгҖҒDiTsгҒҢ3Dз©әй–“еҶ…гҒ§е№ҫдҪ•еӯҰгӮ’зӣҙжҺҘгғўгғҮгғ«еҢ–гҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжҲ‘гҖ…гҒ®PE-FieldгӮ’еј·еҢ–гҒ—гҒҹDiTгҒҜгҖҒеҚҳдёҖз”»еғҸгҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„иҰ–зӮ№еҗҲжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҖҒеҲ¶еҫЎеҸҜиғҪгҒӘз©әй–“з”»еғҸз·ЁйӣҶгҒ«гӮӮдёҖиҲ¬еҢ–гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - Diffusion TransformersпјҲDiTsпјүгҒҜгҖҒиҰ–иҰҡз”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰе„ӘгӮҢгҒҹжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒгғ‘гғғгғҒгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒЁдҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°пјҲPEпјүгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒDiTsгҒҢгҒ©гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«иҰ–иҰҡгӮігғігғҶгғігғ„гӮ’ж•ҙзҗҶгҒҷгӮӢгҒӢгӮ’еҶҚиҖғгҒ—гҖҒPEгҒ®ж‘ӮеӢ•гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгӮӮдёҖиІ«гҒ—гҒҹеҮәеҠӣгӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зҷәиҰӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҚгҖҒдҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’3Dгғ•гӮЈгғјгғ«гғүгҒ«жӢЎејөгҒ—гҒҹPE-FieldгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒгғңгғӘгғҘгғЎгғҲгғӘгғғгӮҜжҺЁи«–гҒЁйҡҺеұӨзҡ„гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’зө„гҒҝиҫјгҒҝгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮеј·еҢ–гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹDiTгҒҜгҖҒж–°гҒ—гҒ„иҰ–зӮ№еҗҲжҲҗгҒЁз©әй–“з”»еғҸз·ЁйӣҶгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰжңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Physics-Informed Diffusion Models, Jan-Hendrik Bastek+, ICLR'25, 2024.03
paper-entry.tags: MachineLearning, DiffusionModel, ICLR, PhysicalConstraints
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.14404 # Authors - Jan-Hendrik Bastek - WaiChing Sun - Dennis M. Kochmann # Abstract - Generative models such as denoising diffusion models are quickly advancing their ability to approximate highly complex data distributions. They are also increasingly leveraged in scientific machine learning, where samples from the implied data distribution are expected to adhere to specific governing equations. We present a framework that unifies generative modeling and partial differential equation fulfillment by introducing a first-principle-based loss term that enforces generated samples to fulfill the underlying physical constraints. Our approach reduces the residual error by up to two orders of magnitude compared to previous work in a fluid flow case study and outperforms task-specific frameworks in relevant metrics for structural topology optimization. We also present numerical evidence that our extended training objective acts as a natural regularization mechanism against overfitting. Our framework is simple to implement and versatile in its applicability for imposing equality and inequality constraints as well as auxiliary optimization objectives. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҖҒзү№гҒ«гғҮгғҺгӮӨгӮёгғігӮ°жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒйқһеёёгҒ«иӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘгғҮгғјгӮҝеҲҶеёғгӮ’иҝ‘дјјгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгӮ’жҖҘйҖҹгҒ«еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒз§‘еӯҰзҡ„ж©ҹжў°еӯҰзҝ’гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮгҒҫгҒҷгҒҫгҒҷжҙ»з”ЁгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒҠгӮҠгҖҒжҡ—й»ҷгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝеҲҶеёғгҒӢгӮүгҒ®гӮөгғігғ—гғ«гҒҜзү№е®ҡгҒ®ж”Ҝй…Қж–№зЁӢејҸгҒ«еҫ“гҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢжңҹеҫ…гҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжң¬з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒз”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҒҸеҫ®еҲҶж–№зЁӢејҸгҒ®жәҖи¶ігӮ’зөұдёҖгҒҷгӮӢгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒз”ҹжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮөгғігғ—гғ«гҒҢеҹәзӨҺгҒЁгҒӘгӮӢзү©зҗҶзҡ„еҲ¶зҙ„гӮ’жәҖгҒҹгҒҷгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«еј·еҲ¶гҒҷгӮӢз¬¬дёҖеҺҹзҗҶгҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸжҗҚеӨұй …гӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰе®ҹзҸҫгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжҲ‘гҖ…гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜгҖҒжөҒдҪ“гҒ®жөҒгӮҢгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢгӮұгғјгӮ№гӮ№гӮҝгғҮгӮЈгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒеҫ“жқҘгҒ®з ”з©¶гҒЁжҜ”ијғгҒ—гҒҰж®Ӣе·®иӘӨе·®гӮ’жңҖеӨ§гҒ§2жЎҒеүҠжёӣгҒ—гҖҒж§ӢйҖ гғҲгғқгғӯгӮёгғјжңҖйҒ©еҢ–гҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢй–ўйҖЈжҢҮжЁҷгҒ§гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜзү№еҢ–еһӢгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒжҲ‘гҖ…гҒ®жӢЎејөгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғҲгғ¬гғјгғӢгғігӮ°зӣ®зҡ„гҒҢйҒҺеӯҰзҝ’гҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢиҮӘз„¶гҒӘжӯЈеүҮеҢ–гғЎгӮ«гғӢгӮәгғ гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰж©ҹиғҪгҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶж•°еҖӨзҡ„иЁјжӢ гӮӮзӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжҲ‘гҖ…гҒ®гғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгҒҜе®ҹиЈ…гҒҢз°ЎеҚҳгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒзӯүејҸгҒҠгӮҲгҒідёҚзӯүејҸеҲ¶зҙ„гҖҒгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҒҜиЈңеҠ©зҡ„гҒӘжңҖйҒ©еҢ–зӣ®зҡ„гӮ’иӘІгҒҷгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®йҒ©з”ЁжҖ§гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰеӨҡз”ЁйҖ”гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҒҸеҫ®еҲҶж–№зЁӢејҸгӮ’зөұдёҖгҒҷгӮӢгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒз”ҹжҲҗгӮөгғігғ—гғ«гҒҢзү©зҗҶзҡ„еҲ¶зҙ„гӮ’жәҖгҒҹгҒҷгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«жҗҚеӨұй …гӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҖӮжөҒдҪ“гҒ®жөҒгӮҢгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢгӮұгғјгӮ№гӮ№гӮҝгғҮгӮЈгҒ§ж®Ӣе·®иӘӨе·®гӮ’жңҖеӨ§2жЎҒеүҠжёӣгҒ—гҖҒж§ӢйҖ гғҲгғқгғӯгӮёгғјжңҖйҒ©еҢ–гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгӮӮе„ӘгӮҢгҒҹжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҖӮйҒҺеӯҰзҝ’гҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢжӯЈеүҮеҢ–еҠ№жһңгӮӮзўәиӘҚгҖӮе®ҹиЈ…гҒҢз°ЎеҚҳгҒ§гҖҒеӨҡж§ҳгҒӘеҲ¶зҙ„гҒ«йҒ©з”ЁеҸҜиғҪгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] OminiControl: Minimal and Universal Control for Diffusion Transformer, Zhenxiong Tan+, ICCV'25 Highlight, 2024.11
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, Controllable, Transformer, DiffusionModel, VariationalAutoEncoder, Selected Papers/Blogs, ICCV, KeyPoint Notes
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.15098 # Authors - Zhenxiong Tan - Songhua Liu - Xingyi Yang - Qiaochu Xue - Xinchao Wang # Abstract - We present OminiControl, a novel approach that rethinks how image conditions are integrated into Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architectures. Current image conditioning methods either introduce substantial parameter overhead or handle only specific control tasks effectively, limiting their practical versatility. OminiControl addresses these limitations through three key innovations: (1) a minimal architectural design that leverages the DiT's own VAE encoder and transformer blocks, requiring just 0.1% additional parameters; (2) a unified sequence processing strategy that combines condition tokens with image tokens for flexible token interactions; and (3) a dynamic position encoding mechanism that adapts to both spatially-aligned and non-aligned control tasks. Our extensive experiments show that this streamlined approach not only matches but surpasses the performance of specialized methods across multiple conditioning tasks. To overcome data limitations in subject-driven generation, we also introduce Subjects200K, a large-scale dataset of identity-consistent image pairs synthesized using DiT models themselves. This work demonstrates that effective image control can be achieved without architectural complexity, opening new possibilities for efficient and versatile image generation systems. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - з§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜOminiControlгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒз”»еғҸжқЎд»¶гҒҢDiffusion TransformerпјҲDiTпјүгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ«гҒ©гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«зөұеҗҲгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢгҒӢгӮ’еҶҚиҖғгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮзҸҫеңЁгҒ®з”»еғҸжқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒ‘жүӢжі•гҒҜгҖҒгҒӢгҒӘгӮҠгҒ®гғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгӮӘгғјгғҗгғјгғҳгғғгғүгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒҷгӮӢгҒӢгҖҒзү№е®ҡгҒ®еҲ¶еҫЎгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒ®гҒҝеҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒ«еҜҫеҝңгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҖҒе®ҹз”Ёзҡ„гҒӘеӨҡж§ҳжҖ§гҒҢеҲ¶йҷҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮOminiControlгҒҜгҖҒд»ҘдёӢгҒ®3гҒӨгҒ®йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘйқ©ж–°гӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®еҲ¶йҷҗгҒ«еҜҫеҮҰгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ(1) DiTгҒ®VAEгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҖгғјгҒЁгғҲгғ©гғігӮ№гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғјгғ–гғӯгғғгӮҜгӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҒҹжңҖе°ҸйҷҗгҒ®гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈиЁӯиЁҲгҒ§гҖҒиҝҪеҠ гҒ®гғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгҒҜгӮҸгҒҡгҒӢ0.1%гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ(2) жқЎд»¶гғҲгғјгӮҜгғігҒЁз”»еғҸгғҲгғјгӮҜгғігӮ’зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгҒҰжҹ”и»ҹгҒӘгғҲгғјгӮҜгғізӣёдә’дҪңз”ЁгӮ’е®ҹзҸҫгҒҷгӮӢзөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮ·гғјгӮұгғігӮ№еҮҰзҗҶжҲҰз•ҘгҖӮ(3) з©әй–“зҡ„гҒ«ж•ҙеҲ—гҒ—гҒҹеҲ¶еҫЎгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒЁйқһж•ҙеҲ—гҒ®еҲ¶еҫЎгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ«йҒ©еҝңгҒҷгӮӢеӢ•зҡ„гҒӘдҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гғЎгӮ«гғӢгӮәгғ гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®еәғзҜ„гҒӘе®ҹйЁ“гҒҜгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®з°Ўзҙ еҢ–гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҢгҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®жқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒ‘гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰе°Ӯй–Җзҡ„гҒӘжүӢжі•гҒ®жҖ§иғҪгӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒдё»йЎҢй§ҶеӢ•з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢгғҮгғјгӮҝгҒ®еҲ¶йҷҗгӮ’е…ӢжңҚгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒDiTгғўгғҮгғ«иҮӘдҪ“гӮ’дҪҝз”ЁгҒ—гҒҰеҗҲжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгӮўгӮӨгғҮгғігғҶгӮЈгғҶгӮЈдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ®гҒӮгӮӢз”»еғҸгғҡгӮўгҒ®еӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҖҢSubjects200KгҖҚгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®з ”з©¶гҒҜгҖҒеҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒӘз”»еғҸеҲ¶еҫЎгҒҢгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ®иӨҮйӣ‘гҒ•гҒӘгҒ—гҒ«йҒ”жҲҗгҒ§гҒҚгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒ§еӨҡж§ҳгҒӘз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®ж–°гҒҹгҒӘеҸҜиғҪжҖ§гӮ’й–ӢгҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - OminiControlгҒҜгҖҒDiffusion TransformerпјҲDiTпјүгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢз”»еғҸжқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒ‘гҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ§гҖҒгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгӮӘгғјгғҗгғјгғҳгғғгғүгӮ’жңҖе°ҸйҷҗгҒ«жҠ‘гҒҲгҒӨгҒӨгҖҒжҹ”и»ҹгҒӘгғҲгғјгӮҜгғізӣёдә’дҪңз”ЁгҒЁеӢ•зҡ„гҒӘдҪҚзҪ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гӮ’е®ҹзҸҫгҖӮеәғзҜ„гҒӘе®ҹйЁ“гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒиӨҮж•°гҒ®жқЎд»¶д»ҳгҒ‘гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§е°Ӯй–Җзҡ„жүӢжі•гӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒеҗҲжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹз”»еғҸгғҡгӮўгҒ®гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҖҢSubjects200KгҖҚгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҖӮеҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒ§еӨҡж§ҳгҒӘз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгӮ·гӮ№гғҶгғ гҒ®еҸҜиғҪжҖ§гӮ’зӨәе”ҶгҖӮ

maintainer-comment-text.p:
DiTгҒ®гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒҜпјҲMMAд»ҘеӨ–гҒҜпјүеӨүжӣҙгҒӣгҒҡгҒ«гҖҒCondition Image C_IгӮ’VAEгҒ§гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ—гҒҹnoisy inputгӮ’DiTгҒ®inputгҒ«concatгҒ—й Ҷдјқж’ӯгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒDiTгӮ’unified conditioningгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲпјқC_IгҒ®зү№еҫҙйҮҸгӮ’д»–гҒ®inputгҒЁеҗҢгҒҳlatent spaceгҒ§еӯҰзҝ’гҒ•гҒӣзөұеҗҲзҡ„гҒ«жүұгҒҶпјүгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеӯҰзҝ’гҒҷгӮӢ[^1]гҖӮ
[^1]: ж—ўеӯҳз ”з©¶гҒҜеҲҘгҒ®гӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҖгҒӢгӮүгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ—гҒҹfeatureгҒҢеҠ з®—гҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҰпјҲејҸ3пјүгҖҒгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҖйғЁеҲҶгҒ«еҲҘйҖ”гғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгҒҢеҝ…иҰҒгҒ гҒЈгҒҹгҒ гҒ‘гҒ§гҒӘгҒҸгҖҒеҠ з®—гҒҜз©әй–“зҡ„гҒӘеҜҫеҝңй–ўдҝӮгҒҢеӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„е ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҒҶгҒҫгҒҸеҜҫеҮҰгҒ§гҒҚгҒҡпјҲfeatureгҒ®ж¬Ўе…ғгҒҢз©әй–“зҡ„гҒӘжғ…е ұгҒ«еҜҫеҝңгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒпјүгҖҒconditional tokenгҒЁimageгҒ®дәӨдә’дҪңз”ЁгӮ’еҰЁгҒ’гҒҰгҒ„гҒҹгҖӮ
гҒҫгҒҹгҖҒpositional encodingгҒ®indexгӮ’conditional tokenгҒЁnoisy image tokensгҒЁе…ұжңүгҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒз©әй–“зҡ„гҒӘеҜҫеҝңй–ўдҝӮгҒҢеӯҳеңЁгҒҷгӮӢгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜпјҲedge guided generationзӯүпјүгҒҜгҒҶгҒҫгҒҸгҒ„гҒЈгҒҹгҒҢгҖҒиў«еҶҷдҪ“гӮ’жҢҮе®ҡгҒҷгӮӢз”ҹжҲҗпјҲsubject driven generation)гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘеҜҫеҝңй–ўдҝӮгҒҢеӯҳеңЁгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜпјҲnon-aligned task)гҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҒҶгҒҫгҒҸгҒ„гҒӢгҒӘгҒӢгҒЈгҒҹгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒnon-aligned taskгҒ®е ҙеҗҲгҒҜгҖҒindexгҒ«гӮӘгғ•гӮ»гғғгғҲгӮ’еҠ гҒҲгӮ·гғ•гғҲгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢпјҲејҸ4пјүгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒconditional text/image tokenй–“гҒ§з©әй–“зҡ„гҒ«overlapгҒ—гҒӘгҒ„гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§жҖ§иғҪгҒҢеӨ§е№…гҒ«ж”№е–„гҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ
ж—ўеӯҳз ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒC_IгҒ®еј·гҒ•гӮ’гӮігғігғҲгғӯгғјгғ«гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒгғҸгӮӨгғ‘гғјгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰе®ҡж•°гӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғүгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹfeatureгӮ’еҠ з®—гҒҷгӮӢйҡӣгҒ®еј·гҒ•гӮ’иӘҝж•ҙгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҹгҒҢпјҲ3.2.3зҜҖпјүгҖҒжң¬жүӢжі•гҒ§гҒҜconcatгӮ’гҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ“гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘж–№жі•гҒҜдҪҝгҒҲгҒӘгҒ„гҖӮгҒқгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒMulti-Modal Attention(MMA)гҒ«гғҸгӮӨгғ‘гғјгғ‘гғ©гғЎгғјгӮҝгҒ«гӮҲгҒЈгҒҰеј·гҒ•гӮ’иӘҝж•ҙеҸҜиғҪгҒӘbias matrixгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҖҒC_IгҒЁXгҒ®attentionгҒ®дәӨдә’дҪңз”ЁгҒ®еј·гҒ•гӮ’иӘҝж•ҙгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§еҜҫеҝңгҒ—гҒҹпјҲејҸ5,6пјүгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Multi-Modal Manipulation via Multi-Modal Policy Consensus, Haonan Chen+, arXiv'25, 2025.09
paper-entry.tags: MultiModal, DiffusionModel, Robotics, Routing
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.23468 # Authors - Haonan Chen - Jiaming Xu - Hongyu Chen - Kaiwen Hong - Binghao Huang - Chaoqi Liu - Jiayuan Mao - Yunzhu Li - Yilun Du - Katherine Driggs-Campbell # Abstract - Effectively integrating diverse sensory modalities is crucial for robotic manipulation. However, the typical approach of feature concatenation is often suboptimal: dominant modalities such as vision can overwhelm sparse but critical signals like touch in contact-rich tasks, and monolithic architectures cannot flexibly incorporate new or missing modalities without retraining. Our method factorizes the policy into a set of diffusion models, each specialized for a single representation (e.g., vision or touch), and employs a router network that learns consensus weights to adaptively combine their contributions, enabling incremental of new representations. We evaluate our approach on simulated manipulation tasks in {RLBench}, as well as real-world tasks such as occluded object picking, in-hand spoon reorientation, and puzzle insertion, where it significantly outperforms feature-concatenation baselines on scenarios requiring multimodal reasoning. Our policy further demonstrates robustness to physical perturbations and sensor corruption. We further conduct perturbation-based importance analysis, which reveals adaptive shifts between modalities. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - еӨҡж§ҳгҒӘж„ҹиҰҡгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгӮ’еҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒ«зөұеҗҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜгҖҒгғӯгғңгғғгғҲж“ҚдҪңгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰйҮҚиҰҒгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒзү№еҫҙгҒ®йҖЈзөҗгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶе…ёеһӢзҡ„гҒӘгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜгҒ—гҒ°гҒ—гҒ°жңҖйҒ©гҒ§гҒҜгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮиҰ–иҰҡгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘж”Ҝй…Қзҡ„гҒӘгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгҒҢгҖҒжҺҘи§ҰгҒҢиұҠеҜҢгҒӘгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰи§ҰиҰҡгҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒӘгҒҫгҒ°гӮүгҒ§йҮҚиҰҒгҒӘдҝЎеҸ·гӮ’ең§еҖ’гҒ—гҒҰгҒ—гҒҫгҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒгғўгғҺгғӘгӮ·гғғгӮҜгҒӘгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒҜгҖҒж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгӮ„ж¬ иҗҪгҒ—гҒҹгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгӮ’еҶҚиЁ“з·ҙгҒӘгҒ—гҒ«жҹ”и»ҹгҒ«зө„гҒҝиҫјгӮҖгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®ж–№жі•гҒҜгҖҒгғқгғӘгӮ·гғјгӮ’дёҖйҖЈгҒ®жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еӣ ж•°еҲҶи§ЈгҒ—гҖҒгҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢгҒҢеҚҳдёҖгҒ®иЎЁзҸҫпјҲдҫӢпјҡиҰ–иҰҡгӮ„и§ҰиҰҡпјүгҒ«зү№еҢ–гҒ—гҖҒгғ«гғјгӮҝгғјгғҚгғғгғҲгғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰеҗҲж„ҸйҮҚгҒҝгӮ’еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҖҒеҪјгӮүгҒ®иІўзҢ®гӮ’йҒ©еҝңзҡ„гҒ«зө„гҒҝеҗҲгӮҸгҒӣгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒж–°гҒ—гҒ„иЎЁзҸҫгҒ®ж®өйҡҺзҡ„гҒӘзөұеҗҲгҒҢеҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҒ{RLBench}гҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢгӮ·гғҹгғҘгғ¬гғјгӮ·гғ§гғіж“ҚдҪңгӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгӮ„гҖҒйҡ гӮҢгҒҹзү©дҪ“гҒ®гғ”гғғгӮӯгғігӮ°гҖҒжүӢгҒ®дёӯгҒ§гҒ®гӮ№гғ—гғјгғігҒ®еҶҚй…ҚзҪ®гҖҒгғ‘гӮәгғ«гҒ®жҢҝе…ҘгҒЁгҒ„гҒЈгҒҹе®ҹдё–з•ҢгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгӮ’и©•дҫЎгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®гӮ·гғҠгғӘгӮӘгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«жҺЁи«–гӮ’еҝ…иҰҒгҒЁгҒҷгӮӢе ҙеҗҲгҒ«гҖҒзү№еҫҙйҖЈзөҗгҒ®гғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гғқгғӘгӮ·гғјгҒҜгҖҒзү©зҗҶзҡ„гҒӘж‘ӮеӢ•гӮ„гӮ»гғігӮөгғјгҒ®еҠЈеҢ–гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгӮӮе …зүўжҖ§гӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ•гӮүгҒ«гҖҒж‘ӮеӢ•гҒ«еҹәгҒҘгҒҸйҮҚиҰҒжҖ§еҲҶжһҗгӮ’иЎҢгҒ„гҖҒгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈй–“гҒ®йҒ©еҝңзҡ„гҒӘгӮ·гғ•гғҲгӮ’жҳҺгӮүгҒӢгҒ«гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - еӨҡж§ҳгҒӘж„ҹиҰҡгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгӮ’зөұеҗҲгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜгғӯгғңгғғгғҲж“ҚдҪңгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰйҮҚиҰҒгҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҖҒеҫ“жқҘгҒ®зү№еҫҙйҖЈзөҗгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜжңҖйҒ©гҒ§гҒҜгҒӘгҒ„гҖӮжҸҗжЎҲжүӢжі•гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒгғқгғӘгӮ·гғјгӮ’жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«еӣ ж•°еҲҶи§ЈгҒ—гҖҒеҗ„гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҢзү№е®ҡгҒ®иЎЁзҸҫгҒ«зү№еҢ–гҖӮгғ«гғјгӮҝгғјгғҚгғғгғҲгғҜгғјгӮҜгӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰйҒ©еҝңзҡ„гҒ«йҮҚгҒҝгӮ’еӯҰзҝ’гҒ—гҖҒж–°гҒ—гҒ„иЎЁзҸҫгҒ®зөұеҗҲгӮ’еҸҜиғҪгҒ«гҒҷгӮӢгҖӮгӮ·гғҹгғҘгғ¬гғјгӮ·гғ§гғігӮ„е®ҹдё–з•ҢгҒ®гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒ§гҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«жҺЁи«–гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰзү№еҫҙйҖЈзөҗгҒ®гғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігӮ’дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒзү©зҗҶзҡ„гҒӘж‘ӮеӢ•гҒ«еҜҫгҒ—гҒҰгӮӮе …зүўжҖ§гӮ’жҢҒгҒӨгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢзўәиӘҚгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгҖӮ

- [Paper Note] See, Hear, and Feel: Smart Sensory Fusion for Robotic Manipulation, Hao Li+, CoRL'22, 2022.12

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] Self-Forcing++: Towards Minute-Scale High-Quality Video Generation, Justin Cui+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, DiffusionModel, LongSequence, read-later, VideoGeneration/Understandings, 4D (Video)
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.02283 # Authors - Justin Cui - Jie Wu - Ming Li - Tao Yang - Xiaojie Li - Rui Wang - Andrew Bai - Yuanhao Ban - Cho-Jui Hsieh # Abstract - Diffusion models have revolutionized image and video generation, achieving unprecedented visual quality. However, their reliance on transformer architectures incurs prohibitively high computational costs, particularly when extending generation to long videos. Recent work has explored autoregressive formulations for long video generation, typically by distilling from short-horizon bidirectional teachers. Nevertheless, given that teacher models cannot synthesize long videos, the extrapolation of student models beyond their training horizon often leads to pronounced quality degradation, arising from the compounding of errors within the continuous latent space. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective approach to mitigate quality degradation in long-horizon video generation without requiring supervision from long-video teachers or retraining on long video datasets. Our approach centers on exploiting the rich knowledge of teacher models to provide guidance for the student model through sampled segments drawn from self-generated long videos. Our method maintains temporal consistency while scaling video length by up to 20x beyond teacher's capability, avoiding common issues such as over-exposure and error-accumulation without recomputing overlapping frames like previous methods. When scaling up the computation, our method shows the capability of generating videos up to 4 minutes and 15 seconds, equivalent to 99.9% of the maximum span supported by our base model's position embedding and more than 50x longer than that of our baseline model. Experiments on standard benchmarks and our proposed improved benchmark demonstrate that our approach substantially outperforms baseline methods in both fidelity and consistency. Our long-horizon videos demo can be found at https://self-forcing-plus-plus.github.io/ # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒз”»еғҸгӮ„еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«йқ©е‘ҪгӮ’гӮӮгҒҹгӮүгҒ—гҖҒеүҚдҫӢгҒ®гҒӘгҒ„иҰ–иҰҡзҡ„е“ҒиіӘгӮ’йҒ”жҲҗгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒгғҲгғ©гғігӮ№гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғјгӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ«дҫқеӯҳгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҖҒзү№гҒ«й•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜиЁҲз®—гӮігӮ№гғҲгҒҢйқһеёёгҒ«й«ҳгҒҸгҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжңҖиҝ‘гҒ®з ”з©¶гҒ§гҒҜгҖҒзҹӯжңҹзҡ„гҒӘеҸҢж–№еҗ‘ж•ҷеё«гҒӢгӮүгҒ®и’ёз•ҷгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгҖҒй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ®гҒҹгӮҒгҒ®иҮӘе·ұеӣһеё°зҡ„гҒӘе®ҡејҸеҢ–гҒҢжҺўжұӮгҒ•гӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ—гҒӢгҒ—гҖҒж•ҷеё«гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҢй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»гӮ’еҗҲжҲҗгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒ„гҒҹгӮҒгҖҒеӯҰз”ҹгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҢиЁ“з·ҙзҜ„еӣІгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҰеӨ–жҢҝгҒ•гӮҢгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒйҖЈз¶ҡзҡ„гҒӘжҪңеңЁз©әй–“еҶ…гҒ§гҒ®гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®и“„з©ҚгҒӢгӮүи‘—гҒ—гҒ„е“ҒиіӘеҠЈеҢ–гҒҢз”ҹгҒҳгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеӨҡгҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮжң¬и«–ж–ҮгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢе“ҒиіӘеҠЈеҢ–гӮ’и»ҪжёӣгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ®гӮ·гғігғ—гғ«гҒ§гҒӮгӮҠгҒӘгҒҢгӮүеҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒӘгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜгҖҒй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»ж•ҷеё«гҒӢгӮүгҒ®зӣЈиҰ–гӮ„й•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»гғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ»гғғгғҲгҒ§гҒ®еҶҚиЁ“з·ҙгӮ’еҝ…иҰҒгҒЁгҒӣгҒҡгҖҒж•ҷеё«гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®иұҠеҜҢгҒӘзҹҘиӯҳгӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒиҮӘе·ұз”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҒҹй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»гҒӢгӮүжҠҪеҮәгҒ—гҒҹгӮөгғігғ—гғ«гӮ»гӮ°гғЎгғігғҲгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰеӯҰз”ҹгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«гӮ¬гӮӨгғҖгғігӮ№гӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ«з„ҰзӮ№гӮ’еҪ“гҒҰгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®жүӢжі•гҒҜгҖҒж•ҷеё«гҒ®иғҪеҠӣгӮ’и¶…гҒҲгҒҰеӢ•з”»гҒ®й•·гҒ•гӮ’жңҖеӨ§20еҖҚгҒҫгҒ§гӮ№гӮұгғјгғ«гӮўгғғгғ—гҒ—гҒӘгҒҢгӮүгҖҒжҷӮй–“зҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’з¶ӯжҢҒгҒ—гҖҒйҒҺеү°йңІеҮәгӮ„гӮЁгғ©гғјгҒ®и“„з©ҚгҒЁгҒ„гҒЈгҒҹдёҖиҲ¬зҡ„гҒӘе•ҸйЎҢгӮ’еӣһйҒҝгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒҫгҒҹгҖҒеҫ“жқҘгҒ®жүӢжі•гҒ®гӮҲгҒҶгҒ«йҮҚиӨҮгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гӮ’еҶҚиЁҲз®—гҒҷгӮӢеҝ…иҰҒгӮӮгҒӮгӮҠгҒҫгҒӣгӮ“гҖӮиЁҲз®—гӮ’гӮ№гӮұгғјгғ«гӮўгғғгғ—гҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®жүӢжі•гҒҜжңҖеӨ§4еҲҶ15з§’гҒ®еӢ•з”»гӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҖҒгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜеҹәжң¬гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®дҪҚзҪ®еҹӢгӮҒиҫјгҒҝгҒҢгӮөгғқгғјгғҲгҒҷгӮӢжңҖеӨ§зҜ„еӣІгҒ®99.9%гҒ«зӣёеҪ“гҒ—гҖҒгғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғігғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®50еҖҚд»ҘдёҠгҒ®й•·гҒ•гҒ«гҒӘгӮҠгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮжЁҷжә–гғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒҠгӮҲгҒіжҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҹж”№е–„гҒ•гӮҢгҒҹгғҷгғігғҒгғһгғјгӮҜгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢе®ҹйЁ“гҒҜгҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҢеҝ е®ҹеәҰгҒЁдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгғҷгғјгӮ№гғ©гӮӨгғіжүӢжі•гӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«дёҠеӣһгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®й•·жңҹеӢ•з”»гғҮгғўгҒҜгҖҒhttps://self-forcing-plus-plus.github.io/ гҒ§иҰӢгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - жң¬и«–ж–ҮгҒ§гҒҜгҖҒй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«гҒҠгҒ‘гӮӢе“ҒиіӘеҠЈеҢ–гӮ’и»ҪжёӣгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮж•ҷеё«гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®зҹҘиӯҳгӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҖҒиҮӘе·ұз”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҒҹй•·гҒ„еӢ•з”»гҒӢгӮүжҠҪеҮәгҒ—гҒҹгӮөгғігғ—гғ«гӮ»гӮ°гғЎгғігғҲгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰеӯҰз”ҹгғўгғҮгғ«гҒ«гӮ¬гӮӨгғҖгғігӮ№гӮ’жҸҗдҫӣгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒ§гҖҒй•·гҒ•гӮ’жңҖеӨ§20еҖҚгҒ«гӮ№гӮұгғјгғ«гӮўгғғгғ—гҒ—гҒӨгҒӨжҷӮй–“зҡ„дёҖиІ«жҖ§гӮ’з¶ӯжҢҒгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒжңҖеӨ§4еҲҶ15з§’гҒ®еӢ•з”»гӮ’з”ҹжҲҗеҸҜиғҪгҒ§гҖҒеҫ“жқҘгҒ®жүӢжі•гӮҲгӮҠгӮӮеҝ е®ҹеәҰгҒЁдёҖиІ«жҖ§гҒ§еӨ§е№…гҒ«е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹзөҗжһңгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ

й–ўйҖЈ:
- [Paper Note] Self Forcing: Bridging the Train-Test Gap in Autoregressive Video Diffusion, Xun Huang+, NeurIPS'25
Self ForcingгҒЁжҜ”ијғгҒ—гҒҰ50sд»ҘдёҠгҒ§гҒ®з”ҹжҲҗгҒ®жҖ§иғҪгҒҢеҗ‘дёҠгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гӮӢгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«иҰӢгҒҲгӮӢ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] End-to-End Multi-Modal Diffusion Mamba, Chunhao Lu+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, MachineLearning, NLP, MultiModal, DiffusionModel, SSM (StateSpaceModel), UMM
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.13253 # Authors - Chunhao Lu - Qiang Lu - Meichen Dong - Jake Luo # Abstract - Current end-to-end multi-modal models utilize different encoders and decoders to process input and output information. This separation hinders the joint representation learning of various modalities. To unify multi-modal processing, we propose a novel architecture called MDM (Multi-modal Diffusion Mamba). MDM utilizes a Mamba-based multi-step selection diffusion model to progressively generate and refine modality-specific information through a unified variational autoencoder for both encoding and decoding. This innovative approach allows MDM to achieve superior performance when processing high-dimensional data, particularly in generating high-resolution images and extended text sequences simultaneously. Our evaluations in areas such as image generation, image captioning, visual question answering, text comprehension, and reasoning tasks demonstrate that MDM significantly outperforms existing end-to-end models (MonoFormer, LlamaGen, and Chameleon etc.) and competes effectively with SOTA models like GPT-4V, Gemini Pro, and Mistral. Our results validate MDM's effectiveness in unifying multi-modal processes while maintaining computational efficiency, establishing a new direction for end-to-end multi-modal architectures. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - зҸҫеңЁгҒ®гӮЁгғігғүгғ„гғјгӮЁгғігғүгҒ®гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒе…ҘеҠӣгҒЁеҮәеҠӣжғ…е ұгӮ’еҮҰзҗҶгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«з•°гҒӘгӮӢгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҖгғјгҒЁгғҮгӮігғјгғҖгғјгӮ’еҲ©з”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®еҲҶйӣўгҒҜгҖҒгҒ•гҒҫгҒ–гҒҫгҒӘгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈгҒ®е…ұеҗҢиЎЁзҸҫеӯҰзҝ’гӮ’еҰЁгҒ’гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«еҮҰзҗҶгӮ’зөұдёҖгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜMDMпјҲMulti-modal Diffusion MambaпјүгҒЁе‘јгҒ°гӮҢгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮMDMгҒҜгҖҒMambaгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®гғһгғ«гғҒгӮ№гғҶгғғгғ—йҒёжҠһжӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’еҲ©з”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒзөұдёҖгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹеӨүеҲҶгӮӘгғјгғҲгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҖгғјгӮ’йҖҡгҒҳгҒҰгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒЁгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ®дёЎж–№гҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒгғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈзү№жңүгҒ®жғ…е ұгӮ’ж®өйҡҺзҡ„гҒ«з”ҹжҲҗгҒҠгӮҲгҒіжҙ—з·ҙгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®йқ©ж–°зҡ„гҒӘгӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒMDMгҒҜй«ҳж¬Ўе…ғгғҮгғјгӮҝгӮ’еҮҰзҗҶгҒҷгӮӢйҡӣгҒ«е„ӘгӮҢгҒҹгғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гӮ’зҷәжҸ®гҒ—гҖҒзү№гҒ«й«ҳи§ЈеғҸеәҰгҒ®з”»еғҸгҒЁжӢЎејөгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгӮ·гғјгӮұгғігӮ№гӮ’еҗҢжҷӮгҒ«з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢиғҪеҠӣгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰе„ӘгӮҢгҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз”»еғҸз”ҹжҲҗгҖҒз”»еғҸгӮӯгғЈгғ—гӮ·гғ§гғӢгғігӮ°гҖҒиҰ–иҰҡзҡ„иіӘе•Ҹеҝңзӯ”гҖҒгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲзҗҶи§ЈгҖҒжҺЁи«–гӮҝгӮ№гӮҜгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®еҲҶйҮҺгҒ§гҒ®и©•дҫЎгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒMDMгҒҜж—ўеӯҳгҒ®гӮЁгғігғүгғ„гғјгӮЁгғігғүгғўгғҮгғ«пјҲMonoFormerгҖҒLlamaGenгҖҒChameleonгҒӘгҒ©пјүгӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«дёҠеӣһгӮҠгҖҒGPT-4VгҖҒGemini ProгҖҒMistralгҒӘгҒ©гҒ®жңҖе…Ҳз«ҜгғўгғҮгғ«гҒЁеҠ№жһңзҡ„гҒ«з«¶дәүгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®зөҗжһңгҒҜгҖҒиЁҲз®—еҠ№зҺҮгӮ’з¶ӯжҢҒгҒ—гҒӘгҒҢгӮүгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’зөұдёҖгҒҷгӮӢMDMгҒ®жңүеҠ№жҖ§гӮ’жӨңиЁјгҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғігғүгғ„гғјгӮЁгғігғүгҒ®гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„ж–№еҗ‘жҖ§гӮ’зўәз«ӢгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - MDMпјҲMulti-modal Diffusion MambaпјүгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶж–°гҒ—гҒ„гӮўгғјгӮӯгғҶгӮҜгғҒгғЈгӮ’жҸҗжЎҲгҒ—гҖҒгӮЁгғігғүгғ„гғјгӮЁгғігғүгҒ®гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«еҮҰзҗҶгӮ’зөұдёҖгҖӮMambaгғҷгғјгӮ№гҒ®йҒёжҠһжӢЎж•ЈгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’з”ЁгҒ„гҒҰгҖҒгӮЁгғігӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒЁгғҮгӮігғјгғҮгӮЈгғігӮ°гҒ§гғўгғҖгғӘгғҶгӮЈзү№жңүгҒ®жғ…е ұгӮ’ж®өйҡҺзҡ„гҒ«з”ҹжҲҗгҖӮй«ҳи§ЈеғҸеәҰз”»еғҸгҒЁгғҶгӮӯгӮ№гғҲгӮ’еҗҢжҷӮгҒ«з”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҖҒж—ўеӯҳгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«дёҠеӣһгӮӢжҖ§иғҪгӮ’зӨәгҒҷгҖӮиЁҲз®—еҠ№зҺҮгӮ’дҝқгҒЎгҒӘгҒҢгӮүгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғ—гғӯгӮ»гӮ№гӮ’зөұдёҖгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒҹгҒӘж–№еҗ‘жҖ§гӮ’зўәз«ӢгҖӮ

paper-entry.title: [Paper Note] VChain: Chain-of-Visual-Thought for Reasoning in Video Generation, Ziqi Huang+, arXiv'25, 2025.10
paper-entry.tags: ComputerVision, Chain-of-Thought, DiffusionModel, Reasoning, VideoGeneration/Understandings, 2D (Image)
paper-entry.issue-body: # URL - https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.05094 # Authors - Ziqi Huang - Ning Yu - Gordon Chen - Haonan Qiu - Paul Debevec - Ziwei Liu # Abstract - Recent video generation models can produce smooth and visually appealing clips, but they often struggle to synthesize complex dynamics with a coherent chain of consequences. Accurately modeling visual outcomes and state transitions over time remains a core challenge. In contrast, large language and multimodal models (e.g., GPT-4o) exhibit strong visual state reasoning and future prediction capabilities. To bridge these strengths, we introduce VChain, a novel inference-time chain-of-visual-thought framework that injects visual reasoning signals from multimodal models into video generation. Specifically, VChain contains a dedicated pipeline that leverages large multimodal models to generate a sparse set of critical keyframes as snapshots, which are then used to guide the sparse inference-time tuning of a pre-trained video generator only at these key moments. Our approach is tuning-efficient, introduces minimal overhead and avoids dense supervision. Extensive experiments on complex, multi-step scenarios show that VChain significantly enhances the quality of generated videos. # Translation (by gpt-4o-mini) - жңҖиҝ‘гҒ®еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгғўгғҮгғ«гҒҜгҖҒж»‘гӮүгҒӢгҒ§иҰ–иҰҡзҡ„гҒ«йӯ…еҠӣзҡ„гҒӘгӮҜгғӘгғғгғ—гӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒҫгҒҷгҒҢгҖҒиӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘгғҖгӮӨгғҠгғҹгӮҜгӮ№гӮ’дёҖиІ«гҒ—гҒҹзөҗжһңгҒ®йҖЈйҺ–гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰеҗҲжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢгҒ®гҒ«иӢҰеҠҙгҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҢеӨҡгҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮиҰ–иҰҡзҡ„гҒӘзөҗжһңгӮ„зҠ¶ж…ӢгҒ®йҒ·з§»гӮ’жҷӮй–“зҡ„гҒ«жӯЈзўәгҒ«гғўгғҮгғ«еҢ–гҒҷгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгҒҜгҖҒдҫқз„¶гҒЁгҒ—гҒҰйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘиӘІйЎҢгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮдёҖж–№гҒ§гҖҒеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘиЁҖиӘһгғўгғҮгғ«гӮ„гғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғўгғҮгғ«пјҲдҫӢпјҡGPT-4oпјүгҒҜгҖҒеј·еҠӣгҒӘиҰ–иҰҡзҡ„зҠ¶ж…ӢжҺЁи«–гӮ„жңӘжқҘдәҲжё¬иғҪеҠӣгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®еј·гҒҝгӮ’зөҗгҒігҒӨгҒ‘гӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«гҖҒз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒҜVChainгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гӮҢгҒҜгҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғўгғҮгғ«гҒӢгӮүгҒ®иҰ–иҰҡзҡ„жҺЁи«–дҝЎеҸ·гӮ’еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«жіЁе…ҘгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„жҺЁи«–жҷӮгҒ®иҰ–иҰҡжҖқиҖғгҒ®йҖЈйҺ–гғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҒҷгҖӮе…·дҪ“зҡ„гҒ«гҒҜгҖҒVChainгҒҜгҖҒеӨ§иҰҸжЁЎгҒӘгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғўгғҮгғ«гӮ’жҙ»з”ЁгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгӮӯгғјгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гҒ®гӮ№гғ‘гғјгӮ№гҒӘгӮ»гғғгғҲгӮ’гӮ№гғҠгғғгғ—гӮ·гғ§гғғгғҲгҒЁгҒ—гҒҰз”ҹжҲҗгҒҷгӮӢе°Ӯз”ЁгҒ®гғ‘гӮӨгғ—гғ©гӮӨгғігӮ’еҗ«гӮ“гҒ§гҒҠгӮҠгҖҒгҒ“гӮҢгӮүгҒ®гӮӯгғјгғўгғјгғЎгғігғҲгҒ§гҒ®гҒҝдәӢеүҚеӯҰзҝ’жёҲгҒҝгҒ®еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗеҷЁгҒ®гӮ№гғ‘гғјгӮ№гҒӘжҺЁи«–жҷӮгғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’гӮ¬гӮӨгғүгҒҷгӮӢгҒҹгӮҒгҒ«дҪҝз”ЁгҒ•гӮҢгҒҫгҒҷгҖӮз§ҒгҒҹгҒЎгҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒҜгғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°еҠ№зҺҮгҒҢй«ҳгҒҸгҖҒжңҖе°ҸйҷҗгҒ®гӮӘгғјгғҗгғјгғҳгғғгғүгӮ’е°Һе…ҘгҒ—гҖҒеҜҶгҒӘзӣЈиҰ–гӮ’еӣһйҒҝгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮиӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘеӨҡж®өйҡҺгӮ·гғҠгғӘгӮӘгҒ«й–ўгҒҷгӮӢеәғзҜ„гҒӘе®ҹйЁ“гҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒVChainгҒҢз”ҹжҲҗгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹеӢ•з”»гҒ®е“ҒиіӘгӮ’еӨ§е№…гҒ«еҗ‘дёҠгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’зӨәгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ # Summary (by gpt-4o-mini) - VChainгҒҜгҖҒгғһгғ«гғҒгғўгғјгғҖгғ«гғўгғҮгғ«гҒ®иҰ–иҰҡзҡ„жҺЁи«–гӮ’еӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗгҒ«жҙ»з”ЁгҒҷгӮӢж–°гҒ—гҒ„гғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гғҜгғјгӮҜгҒ§гҖҒйҮҚиҰҒгҒӘгӮӯгғјгғ•гғ¬гғјгғ гӮ’з”ҹжҲҗгҒ—гҖҒеӢ•з”»з”ҹжҲҗеҷЁгҒ®гғҒгғҘгғјгғӢгғігӮ°гӮ’еҠ№зҺҮзҡ„гҒ«гӮ¬гӮӨгғүгҒ—гҒҫгҒҷгҖӮгҒ“гҒ®гӮўгғ—гғӯгғјгғҒгҒ«гӮҲгӮҠгҖҒиӨҮйӣ‘гҒӘгӮ·гғҠгғӘгӮӘгҒ«гҒҠгҒ„гҒҰз”ҹжҲҗеӢ•з”»гҒ®е“ҒиіӘгҒҢеӨ§е№…гҒ«еҗ‘дёҠгҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ
